geokguk.basis: 월지 寅 정기 甲 기준

activatedPatterns.patternThesis: Career upside is active and external advancement paths are opening.
Steady accumulation is available when execution is disciplined.
Output is possible, but recovery debt is building in the background.
Indirect support exists and becomes visible when you ask clearly.
Public perception matters more than usual, so precision must lead communication.
Trust-based partnership can unlock value if roles are explicit.
Results improve when you use connections, context, and introductions deliberately.
Career signals are clustering on the upside, so deliberate execution can compound.

step7_strategy_engine.whyChosen: 지금은 확장+리스크관리 국면입니다. 공격 55% / 방어 45%로 운영하며 재확인 단계를 생략하지 마세요. (E:32.7/V:14.6/S:28.6)
